testcase.name: should login with valid credentials
should not login with invalid credentials

failure.message:
Expect to have text
Expected: StringContaining "You logged into a secure area!" Received: "Your password is invalid! ×"

testcase.system-err:
Error: Expect to have text
Expected: StringContaining "You logged into a secure area!" Received: "Your password is invalid! ×" at Context.<anonymous> (/Users/miguelangarano/Documents/GitHub/currents-junit-xml-example/packages/wdio/tests/signup.e2e.js:11:41)
